text_original: really good app better than some. it does cut you off but after a long while. you can talk to different AIs and do different stories.
text_zh: 非常棒的应用，比其他的都要好。它确实会断开连接，但那是过了很久之后。你可以和不同的 AI 聊天，体验不同的故事。
reply_original: Thank you for the 4-star review! We are thrilled to hear you're enjoying the variety of characters and stories on Fantasia. It is great that you found our chat limits more generous than others! We are constantly working to balance server costs with providing the best experience.
reply_zh: 感谢您的四星好评！我们很高兴听到您喜欢 Fantasia 上丰富多样的角色和故事。很高兴您发现我们的聊天限制比其他平台更宽松！我们一直在努力平衡服务器成本与提供最佳体验之间的关系。
